name: Casa Alzambra
description:
Casa Alzambra

Contemporary ground floor 3-bed apartment with south-west facing terrace, in one of the most exclusive complexes in Puerto Banús with amazing pool areas and communal gardens.

Casa Alzambra is a beautiful apartment only a few meters from the large swimming pool area and subtropical gardens. Located in the exquisite and prestigious complex La Alzambra, with just 400 meters to restaurants, convenience stores and a 12 mins stroll to the world-famous beaches and marina Puerto Banús.

Casa Alzambra is a spacious ground floor apartment consisting of three bedrooms, two bathrooms. There is an en-suite master bedroom with a king-size bed (180 cm) and direct access to the terrace, a second bedroom with a 160cm bed and a third bedroom with two single beds (90cm). The kitchen is fully equipped with all the necessary appliances and essentials. There is also a utility room with a washing machine. The spacious and bright lounge and dining area has direct access to the large terrace with views over subtropical gardens and pool.

The large south-west facing terrace naturally divides into two sections: a dining area and BBQ with views of the tropical gardens, and a relaxation area furnished with contemporary lounge sofas where you can enjoy the landscaped subtropical gardens and the peaceful surroundings.

The bathrooms have underfloor heating, there is air conditioning and wifi throughout. There is underground parking for 1 car. Pool towels are provided.

From the private underground parking space, there is a lift directly to the front door of the property. Just 400 meters away, you have convenience stores and restaurants. This property and complex give you privacy and comfort in an exclusive environment comparable to 5* hotels.

With one of the most desirable and exclusive locations, you will, literally on your doorstep, have a wide variety of international and local restaurants, convenience stores, beautiful beaches, fabulous shopping and the world-famous jet-set marina of Puerto Banús. Experience Puerto Banus and Marbella’s attractions, nightlife, historical gems, lovely beaches and chiringuitos. Every golfer’s paradise is just 5 minutes away. Also, you can walk through the grounds to reach the Aloha Strip with its restaurants and bars.

Please note that we welcome families and couples only, no groups under 30, and no hen or stag parties. Should you fall outside of this category but wish to book nonetheless, please send us an enquiry detailing a bit more about yourself and the group that you will be travelling with so we can request this for you.

We look forward to welcoming you! Don’t forget to enquire about our Concierge Services!
rules: No groups under 30 years of age
